Summary:
-------------

Short Description: 
INC10489700 | ngcs097.2.sr02.fra04 Et15/1 < > ngas02.sr02.fra04 5/28/1 | Link Flapping

Outage Start:Sat 2025-12-06 09:26:47 UTC    
Outage End:TBD  
Severity: 4
Source of detection: monitoring

Impact / Actions:
---------------------

Description of event: Link flap, failure, or errors on a circuit
Potential customer impact: None, loss of network / backbone redundancy

Actions taken: 
Actions pending/ongoing:

Root Cause:
----------------

RCA: 
FPA:
close_notes: Link shut to mitigate any further impact. Will proceed to do Layer1 troubleshooting to resolve any issues with the link before adding it back to service. (Note: This incident was resolved via one-touch automation.)
